content:
Subject: Re: Heart rate sensor module quote - HRS-2024-A

Hi Wesley,

Thank you for your inquiry about the heart rate sensor modules for your medical device project.

I'm pleased to provide the following quote for the HRS-2024-A:

- Part Number: HRS-2024-A
- Quantity: 500 units
- Unit Price: $185.00 USD
- Total: $92,500.00
- Lead Time: 4 weeks from PO
- Payment Terms: Net 30

This sensor module includes:
- High-precision PPG sensor
- Integrated signal processing
- I2C communication interface  
- Medical-grade housing (IP65)
- FDA 510(k) cleared

The 4-week lead time assumes standard production. If you need expedited delivery, we can potentially reduce this to 3 weeks for an additional 15% rush charge.

Please note this quote is valid for 30 days. We also offer volume discounts for orders over 1,000 units if you're planning larger quantities.

Let me know if you have any technical questions or need additional documentation. I'm happy to schedule a call to discuss your project requirements in more detail.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Senior Sales Engineer
MedTech Components Inc
s.chen@medtechcomp.com
(858) 555-0123
